news.title:
Crisil Ratings downgraded VIP Industries' long-term rating to Crisil A Negative and short-term rating to Crisil A2.
The downgrade reflects the company's financial performance; total bank loan facilities rated at Rs. 464 crore.
news.summary:
Crisil Ratings downgraded VIP Industries' long-term rating to Crisil A Negative and short-term rating to Crisil A2.
The downgrade reflects the company's financial performance; total bank loan facilities rated at Rs. 464 crore.

news.title:
VIP Industries appoints Rahul Poddar as CFO effective March 11, 2026.
Manish Desai steps down as CFO on March 10, 2026, but remains in the company.
news.summary:
VIP Industries appoints Rahul Poddar as CFO effective March 11, 2026.
Manish Desai steps down as CFO on March 10, 2026, but remains in the company.

news.title:
VIP Industries grants 1.8L ESARs to eligible employees under ESARP 2018 at Rs. 388/share.
The ESARs, covering up to 17.1L shares, are exercisable within 5 years of vesting.
news.summary:
VIP Industries grants 1.8L ESARs to eligible employees under ESARP 2018 at Rs. 388/share.
The ESARs, covering up to 17.1L shares, are exercisable within 5 years of vesting.

news.title:
Supreme Court permits VIP Industries to sell Carlton inventory till June 1, 2026.
Competitor acquires Carlton trademark license; global sales remain unaffected.
news.summary:
Supreme Court permits VIP Industries to sell Carlton inventory till June 1, 2026.
Competitor acquires Carlton trademark license; global sales remain unaffected.

news.title:
VIP Industries faced GST inspection at its Mumbai, Nashik units under Maharashtra GST Act.
The company stated no material impact on financials or operations; shares fell 1.9% to Rs 364.95 on BSE.
news.summary:
VIP Industries faced GST inspection at its Mumbai, Nashik units under Maharashtra GST Act.
The company stated no material impact on financials or operations; shares fell 1.9% to Rs 364.95 on BSE.

news.title:
Maharashtra tax authorities initiated inspections at VIP Industries on Feb 24, 2026.
Action under GST Act 2017; no violations reported, company cooperating fully.
news.summary:
Maharashtra tax authorities initiated inspections at VIP Industries on Feb 24, 2026.
Action under GST Act 2017; no violations reported, company cooperating fully.

news.title:
Elara Capital downgrades VIP Industries to 'Accumulate' from 'Buy' citing weak Q3FY26 performance.
Revenue missed estimates by 6.2% due to elevated discounting and competition from D2C players.
news.summary:
Elara Capital downgrades VIP Industries to 'Accumulate' from 'Buy' citing weak Q3FY26 performance.
Revenue missed estimates by 6.2% due to elevated discounting and competition from D2C players.

news.title: IDBI Capital issues a Sell report on VIP Industries; CMP at 380.3.
news.summary: IDBI Capital issues a Sell report on VIP Industries; CMP at 380.3.

news.title:
VIP Industries Q3 net loss surged to 529M INR from 124.2M YoY.
Q3 revenue declined to 4.5B INR from 5.44B INR YoY.
news.summary:
VIP Industries Q3 net loss surged to 529M INR from 124.2M YoY.
Q3 revenue declined to 4.5B INR from 5.44B INR YoY.

news.title: V I P Industries signs a property lease deal in Nagpur worth ₹511.8M.
news.summary: V I P Industries signs a property lease deal in Nagpur worth ₹511.8M.

news.title:
VIP Industries sells its non-core Nashik land to DGP Realty for INR 24.3 crore.
The related party transaction was conducted at arm's length and is non-material as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
VIP Industries sells its non-core Nashik land to DGP Realty for INR 24.3 crore.
The related party transaction was conducted at arm's length and is non-material as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
VIP Industries promoters plan to sell 4% stake via block deals, reducing their holding to 16%.
Shares of VIP Industries traded 0.7% higher at Rs 382.1, down 20% YTD in 2025 so far.
news.summary:
VIP Industries promoters plan to sell 4% stake via block deals, reducing their holding to 16%.
Shares of VIP Industries traded 0.7% higher at Rs 382.1, down 20% YTD in 2025 so far.

news.title:
VIP Industries' promoters sold a 25.9% stake to Multiples PE, completing a 32% stake sale plan.
Shares rose 5.7% to ₹386.5 post-transaction, with an intraday high of ₹397, exceeding the ₹388 offer price.
news.summary:
VIP Industries' promoters sold a 25.9% stake to Multiples PE, completing a 32% stake sale plan.
Shares rose 5.7% to ₹386.5 post-transaction, with an intraday high of ₹397, exceeding the ₹388 offer price.

news.title: VIPInd saw 3.7 crore shares traded, equating to 26% of equity, via two block deals.
news.summary: VIPInd saw 3.7 crore shares traded, equating to 26% of equity, via two block deals.

news.title:
VIP Industries witnessed a BSE block trade worth Rs 1,381.3 crore.
Around 37,036,951 shares traded at Rs 372.95 each at opening.
news.summary:
VIP Industries witnessed a BSE block trade worth Rs 1,381.3 crore.
Around 37,036,951 shares traded at Rs 372.95 each at opening.

news.title:
Crisil Ratings downgraded VIP Industries due to financial results review.
Total rated bank facilities amount to Rs.424 Cr; ratings under surveillance.
news.summary:
Crisil Ratings downgraded VIP Industries due to financial results review.
Total rated bank facilities amount to Rs.424 Cr; ratings under surveillance.

news.title:
VIP Industries plans to sell non-core asset, VIP House, for INR 40.71 crore.
Transaction with Kemp & Co., part of the promoter group, is at arm's length.
news.summary:
VIP Industries plans to sell non-core asset, VIP House, for INR 40.71 crore.
Transaction with Kemp & Co., part of the promoter group, is at arm's length.

news.title:
IDBI Capital advises 'Sell' on VIP Industries post weak Q2 results.
Revenue dropped 25% YoY to Rs 4.1B; gross margins fell to 30.6%.
news.summary:
IDBI Capital advises 'Sell' on VIP Industries post weak Q2 results.
Revenue dropped 25% YoY to Rs 4.1B; gross margins fell to 30.6%.

news.title:
VIP Industries reports Q2 net loss of ₹1.43B vs ₹330.5M YoY.
Q2 revenue declined to ₹4.06B from ₹5.44B YoY.
news.summary:
VIP Industries reports Q2 net loss of ₹1.43B vs ₹330.5M YoY.
Q2 revenue declined to ₹4.06B from ₹5.44B YoY.

news.title:
Marico, Tata Motors PV, Max Healthcare, and Natco Pharma to announce Q2 results today. Key estimates: Marico revenue Rs 3,409 cr, Tata Motors Rs 95,151 cr.
Max Healthcare revenue Rs 2,537 cr, Natco Pharma Rs 1,155 cr. Siemens Q4 revenue at Rs 4,724 cr, VIP Industries projects net loss of Rs 13 cr.
news.summary:
Marico, Tata Motors PV, Max Healthcare, and Natco Pharma to announce Q2 results today. Key estimates: Marico revenue Rs 3,409 cr, Tata Motors Rs 95,151 cr.
Max Healthcare revenue Rs 2,537 cr, Natco Pharma Rs 1,155 cr. Siemens Q4 revenue at Rs 4,724 cr, VIP Industries projects net loss of Rs 13 cr.
